title: Maharashtra's Hidden Geographic Secrets
description:
Explore the geography of Maharashtra, India’s third largest and second most populated state in a simple and visual way. This video breaks down Maharashtra’s location, districts, regional divisions, mountain ranges, rivers, forests, coastline, and its unique position in peninsular India.

From the Western Ghats (Sahyadri range) shaping rainfall patterns to the Deccan lava plateau, and from the Konkan coast to Vidarbha’s dry interiors, Maharashtra’s geography explains a lot about its climate, economy, and history. We also look at its major rivers like Godavari, Krishna, Tapi and Wardha, and why the state’s location is strategically powerful for trade and connectivity.

Share this with your friends from Maharashtra and anyone who wants to understand Indian geography in a simple way.

#Maharashtra #GeographyOfMaharashtra #IndianGeography #WesternGhats #DeccanPlateau #GodavariRiver #IndiaExplained #GeographyFacts #IndianStates #Konkan #Vidarbha #Marathwada #Sahyadri #EducationalVideo
